title: TheCrushyyEns's Elytra
description:
This pack makes your elytra look cooler.  Differences
- A special elytra texture
- Fully Compatible with 1.21.11


 Installation

*Download the resource pack from Modrinth
*Place file in your .minecraft/resourcepacks
folder 
*Launch Minecraft
body: I'm TheCrushyyEns. I'm a new creator. I illuistrated this elytra texture me own and I hope you guys like this resource pack. This texture looks more cleanler, modern and simple. I suggest to you using this pack with the "Minecraft Experience" cape-if u have.
